source: During lunch, I clean up the shared doc as a quick reset, while my battery still holds.
Before our next meet, I rewrite the opening paragraph without making a big deal of it, so I am not scrambling at night.
Before the quiz starts, I message the teacher about the deadline just to be safe, so I do not lose track.
During lunch, I message the teacher about the deadline without making a big deal of it, since we present on Friday.
When the wifi cooperates, I message the teacher about the deadline as a quick reset, even if my bus is crowded.
During study hall, I plan my study blocks as a quick reset, since we present on Friday.
If the lab is open, I finish the missing homework section just in case, without skipping dinner.
